title: GlossaryTerm

id.description: Stable URN identifying this glossary term (urn:srcos:glossary:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

name.description: Canonical display name of the term.

definition.description: Authoritative human-readable definition of the term.

synonyms.description: Alternative names or abbreviations for this term.

tags.description: Semantic classification tags (e.g., 'pii', 'financial') applied to this term.

authorityLinks.description: References to external authority systems that recognise this term.

relatedTerms.description: URNs of other GlossaryTerms that are semantically related.

links.description: Optional hypermedia links to further documentation.

description: A canonical business term with its authoritative definition, synonyms, semantic classification tags, external authority links, and cross-references, forming the basis of semantic unification across datasets and fields.
